title: RPGCraft
description: A Minecraft Modpack to make Minecraft look like an RPG!
body:
This is a modpack that makes your game feel and look like an rpg!
# Setup
1. Start by making sure that the correct resource packs are enabled:
  - Patrix 32x
  - The Continuity Resource Packs
  - Built-In Fabric Resource Packs
2. Then make sure that you have Rethinking Voxels set up as the shader pack
3. Now set up distant horizons as nessisary

# What does this modpack do?
- Revamp the graphics to make minecraft look more realistic.
- Make the gameplay loop more intense.
- Add in basic journeying elements (Minimap, Lots of Villages, etc.)
- Overhaul the third-person perspective
- Make multiplayer simpiler
- Make your computer run slow while playing
- Slight general optimization
